name: Mini Volt
explanation: A compact, expressive single-oscillator mono synth: one wide-range main oscillator (saw blended with a PWM pulse) plus a square sub an octave down, feeding a 4-pole resonant ladder low-pass with its own snappy filter envelope. Osc Mod adds a small LFO that vibratos the pitch and breathes the pulse width for vocal growl, Glide slides pitch between notes (last-note priority), and Sub thickens the low end. Cutoff and Resonance sing; the whole voice stays mono and bounded.
